markets.rules_primary: If Wyatt Langford records 3+ hits in the San Diego vs Texas professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 20, 2026 at 4:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Wyatt Langford is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Wyatt Langford starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Wyatt Langford is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Wyatt Langford is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Wyatt Langford: 3+ hits?
